description: MDH: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area per FGI 2022 as adopted by Minnesota.
citation: Minnesota Rules 4640 / Minnesota Department of Health

description: MDH: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear; two-bed rooms minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
MDH: ICU cubicle minimum 150 sq ft; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per patient.
MDH: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 120 sq ft per treatment space.
MDH: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width per NFPA 101.
MDH: Surgical suites 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered.
MDH: All hospital construction and major renovation requires MDH Health Regulation Division plan review and approval. No CON law in Minnesota (repealed 1984).
citation: Minnesota Statutes §144.55 / MDH Health Regulation Division

description: MDH: NICU each infant care space minimum 120 sq ft; private NICU room minimum 150 sq ft per FGI as adopted.
